blockers.description: Thirdweb client ID is set to 'placeholder' — real wallet connection is not possible, blocking VAL-AUTH-003 and VAL-AUTH-004
blockers.quickFixAttempted: None — modifying production code or env vars is prohibited by testing rules

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-AUTH-001, VAL-AUTH-002), 2 blocked (VAL-AUTH-003, VAL-AUTH-004 — require real wallet connection impossible with placeholder thirdweb client ID)
